migration.target: ASP.NET Core 10 Razor Pages + EF Core + SQLite

forms.recordSource: SELECT DISTINCTROW TestId, TestDescription FROM Test

lstTest.note: OnClick enables cmdEnterResults button → replicated with JavaScript change event

vbaTranslation.lstTest_Click: JavaScript: enables submit button when radio is checked

forms.query_StudentInTest: SELECT FilterResult.ResultId, FilterResult.StudentId, Student.StudentName, FilterResult.TestId, FilterResult.Mark FROM Student LEFT JOIN FilterResult ON Student.StudentId = FilterResult.StudentId ORDER BY StudentName
forms.query_FilterResult: SELECT ResultId, StudentId, TestId, Mark FROM StudentResult WHERE TestId = [forms]![ChooseTest]![lstTest]
forms.efCoreEquivalent: LINQ left join: from s in Students join r in StudentResults.Where(x => x.TestId == testId) on s.StudentId equals r.StudentId into results from r in results.DefaultIfEmpty()

vbaTranslation.Form_Current: JavaScript: auto-focus first .mark-input on page load
vbaTranslation.Mark_BeforeUpdate: Server POST handler sets TestId from bound [BindProperty] TestId — equivalent to reading Forms!ChooseTest!LstTest
